name: FrankOS Memory Governance
description: Runtime memory integrity guardrails for provenance, classification, confidence, and supersession.

mode.label: Enforcement Mode
mode.help: off = disabled, shadow = evaluate+log only, enforce = block prohibited/escalate outcomes

emitDecisionLog.label: Emit Decision Events
emitDecisionLog.help: Emit memory governance diagnostic events for evaluated memory mutations

memoryMutatingTools.label: Memory Mutating Tools
memoryMutatingTools.help: Optional override list of memory tools treated as mutating
